summary: Verified Revize 19 changes — (1) 4-3-3 CM slot geometry now visibly separated from LCM/RCM (CM cy=588 vs LCM/RCM cy=524, a ~64px vertical gap), (2) Final 11/11 view renders the new FIFA-style card grid via data-testid='final-roster-cards' with team name + KADRON HAZIR + TAKIM OVR pill + 11 PlayerCards + KLC/DEF/ORT/HÜC stat row + TURNUVAYA BAŞLA hint, and (3) PlayerCard xs size is w-32 (confirmed via DOM class inspection). No regressions detected in setup/draft phase flows.
verified_features: 4-3-3 LCM/CM/RCM geometry: slot-5 (LCM) at viewport cx=826,cy=524 ; slot-6 (CM) at cx=960,cy=588 ; slot-7 (RCM) at cx=1093,cy=524. CM is now ~64px BELOW LCM/RCM, confirming top:48/58/48 + left:22/50/78 spread.
Final view (11/11) renders container with data-testid='final-roster-cards'.

Container contents verified: cardCount=11, gridCls='grid grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-5 gap-2 max-h-[520px] overflow-y-auto pr-1', teamName 'TEST KADRO' visible, '🏆 KADRON HAZIR' label present, TAKIM OVR pill present (showing 87), 'Sağ üstten TURNUVAYA BAŞLA' hint present, KLC=90 DEF=89 ORT=86 HÜC=85 all visible.
TURNUVAYA BAŞLA top-right button is enabled at 11/11 (disabled attribute = None).
PlayerCard xs size className contains 'w-32' (verified by DOM inspection on rendered final-roster card).
Setup phase still works (3-col layout) — fresh start lands on KOMUTA MERKEZİ with formation/tactic/dice columns.
Draft phase Spin the Wheel right panel still renders correctly with 5-card grid at 1920px.
No console errors observed during reload, draft setup, roll, selection, or final-view rendering.
test_method: Playwright with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Injected complete save state into localStorage key 'ucl_draft_save_v1' (screen='draft', xi=[11 players with _season/_club/_crest/_country], formationId='4-3-3', tactic='GEGENPRESS') and reloaded to land directly in 11/11 final view. Geometry validated via getBoundingClientRect on pitch-slot-{5,6,7}.
critical_code_review_comments: DraftScreen.jsx line 505: final-roster-cards block uses {teamName || 'DRAFT TAKIMI'} and reuses Stat helper — clean, consistent with setup phase stats.
PlayerCard.jsx line 21: xs:'w-32' bump confirmed (was w-28). All other sizes unchanged (sm:w-36, md:w-44, lg:w-56).
formations.js 4-3-3 slot positions updated cleanly. Other formations (4-4-2, 3-5-2, 5-3-2, 4-2-3-1) untouched and intact.

Tactic shift logic (applyTacticShift) will still apply on top of the new base positions — GEGENPRESS MID:-5 will pull CM up from 58→53, LCM/RCM 48→43. Verified the vertical separation between CM and LCM/RCM is preserved after shift since both groups shift by same MID amount.
seed_data_creation: Synthetic 11-player Ajax 1995 XI was injected into localStorage for the final-view test. Reset via localStorage.clear() between tests. No backend seed data was created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified the three Revize 19 deliverables: (a) 4-3-3 CM hitbox spread (verified by bounding-box deltas — CM ~64px below LCM/RCM, removing overlap), (b) 11/11 final view card grid with KADRON HAZIR + OVR pill + 11 PlayerCards + KLC/DEF/ORT/HÜC + hint, (c) xs PlayerCard w-32 width. localStorage injection technique works: SAVE_KEY='ucl_draft_save_v1', xi entries must include _season,_club,_crest,_country for cards to render (handlePlaceOnSlot attaches these automatically during normal play). Frontend hot reload is enabled — no supervisor restarts needed.
rca of the issue: N/A - no issues found, all three requested fixes verified working as specified.
